properties.label: Text
properties.description: The text string to display. Supports multiple lines and special tokens for countdown modes. When non-empty, the file picker and lyric track are disabled.

properties.label: From File
properties.description: Path to a text file whose contents are displayed instead of the text field. Each line in the file is treated as a separate text line. Disabled when the Text field above is non-empty.

properties.label: From Lyrics
properties.description: Selects a lyric timing track to use as the text source. The current lyric phrase or word is displayed at each point in time. Disabled when Text or From File is set.

properties.label: Font
properties.description: The font face, size, and style used to render the text.

properties.label: XL Font
properties.description: Selects an xLights bitmap font (under fonts/) to use instead of the OS font. 'Use OS Fonts' falls back to the Font picker above.

properties.label: Movement
properties.description: Direction the text moves across the model. Options include scrolling left/right/up/down, diagonal, wavey motion, word-flip, and vector-based movement between start and end positions.

properties.label: Move to center
properties.description: When enabled, the text movement stops when the text reaches the center of the model rather than continuing off screen. Only meaningful when Movement is not 'none'.

properties.label: Do not repeat
properties.description: When enabled, the text scrolls through once and then stops instead of repeating in a loop. Only meaningful when Movement is not 'none'.

properties.label: Speed
properties.description: How fast the text scrolls across the model. Higher values produce faster movement.

properties.label: Effect
properties.description: Text rendering style. Normal draws text horizontally; other options rotate or orient the text vertically.

properties.label: Count down
properties.description: Enables countdown mode. The text field value is used as the target, and the displayed text shows the remaining time in the selected format.
properties.tooltip:
seconds: enter time in seconds
minutes seconds: enter time as mm:ss. To prepend or append text to the counter, delimit the time with / (The next show begins in /15:30/! Stay Tuned.)

to date 'd h m s'
to date 'h:m:s'
to date 'm' or 's'
to date 's'

These options count down to given date based on system date and time. Enter Date in on of the following formats: 
Fri, 25 Dec 2015 00:00:00 +0100
Fri, 25 Dec 2015 00:00:00 CST
Fri, 25 Dec 2015 00:00:00 MST


!to date!%fmt

This option allows you to choose the output format. i.e. days only.
Enter Date in the following format to display days only:
/Fri, 25 Dec 2015 00:00:00 +0100/ %D

properties.label: Offsets In Pixels
properties.description: When enabled, the X and Y position values are interpreted as pixel offsets rather than percentage-based positions.

properties.label: Color Per Word
properties.description: When enabled, each word in the text is drawn using a different color from the palette, cycling through the available colors.
properties.tooltip: Change color after each word if checked

properties.label: X-axis Start
properties.description: Horizontal starting position of the text. Used as the origin for vector movement or as a static offset when movement is none.

properties.label: Y-axis Start
properties.description: Vertical starting position of the text. Used as the origin for vector movement or as a static offset when movement is none.

properties.label: X-axis End
properties.description: Horizontal ending position for vector movement mode. The text moves from the start position to this position over the effect duration.

properties.label: Y-axis End
properties.description: Vertical ending position for vector movement mode. The text moves from the start position to this position over the effect duration.
